title: Trump praises Hungary PM Viktor Orbán after Vance calls him at Budapest rally
summary_full: Vance said he was not there to tell Hungarians how to vote, but later told them to "go to the polls" and "stand with Viktor Orbán, because he stands for you."
summary_public: Vance said he was not there to tell Hungarians how to vote, but later told them to "go to the polls" and "stand with Viktor Orbán, because he stands for you."

HU.label: neutral
HU.evidence: Trump praises Hungary PM Viktor Orbán
